name: Crunchy Turkey Sandwich Melts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup KRAFT Natural Shredded Cheddar Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix turkey, cheese, mayo, onion, mustard, and pepper.
2. Arrange 2 to 3 pickle slices on the bottom half of each bun.
3. Top each with about 1/2 cup of the turkey mixture.
4. Place top halves of the buns on the sandwiches.
5. Place the sandwiches on a cookie sheet and cover tightly with foil.
6. Bake at 350°F for 15 minutes.
